fixtures.description: Small (5 args) deliberation with one clearly dominant hub. Non-adversarial baseline.
Small (6 args) deliberation with three co-equal hubs. Adversarial: probes hub-collapse failure.
Medium (40 args) deliberation with diffuse hub structure (>5 co-equal). Adversarial: briefing must NOT name a single hub.
Medium (30 args) deliberation with two unanswered-undercut blocked conclusions. Adversarial: refusal must not be overridden.
Very-large (300 args) deliberation triggering hierarchicalMode. Adversarial: briefing must surface size disclosure.
